title: xanthophyllum discolor subsp. macranthum
intro: Xanthophyllum discolor subsp. macranthum is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to Malaysia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum discolor subsp. macranthum include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, making it useful in reducing pain and body temperature. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, with its herbal preparations often combined with other plants for enhanced effects.
